title: Pleural chest pain after long-haul travel
context: ED triage of a 34-year-old woman with sudden shortness of breath.
observations: Sharp right-sided chest pain worse with inspiration
Heart rate 118 bpm, SpO2 91% on room air

title: Nocturnal cough with episodic wheeze
context: Primary care visit for 28-year-old man with recurring nighttime respiratory symptoms.
observations: Dry cough and chest tightness at night 3-4 times/week
Expiratory wheeze on exam during symptoms

title: Progressive edema and frothy urine
context: Outpatient nephrology referral for 46-year-old with swelling and fatigue.

title: Polyuria with acute weight loss
context: Urgent care evaluation of 19-year-old college student with dehydration symptoms.
observations: Positive serum ketones and anion-gap metabolic acidosis

title: Fever, flank pain, and dysuria
context: ED presentation of 31-year-old woman with urinary symptoms and systemic illness.
observations: Urinalysis: leukocyte esterase positive, nitrite positive, pyuria

title: Unilateral calf swelling after surgery
context: Post-op day 8 orthopedic patient reports leg pain and swelling.
observations: Left calf circumference 3 cm larger than right
Calf warmth and tenderness along deep venous tract
Doppler ultrasound shows non-compressible popliteal vein

title: Tremor, weight loss, and heat intolerance
context: Endocrine clinic consult for 41-year-old woman with sympathetic overactivity symptoms.
observations: Fine resting tremor and persistent tachycardia
Unintentional 5-kg weight loss despite increased appetite
Warm moist skin and heat intolerance
history: Family history of autoimmune thyroid disease

title: Asymmetric facial weakness on waking
context: Same-day neurology assessment of 52-year-old man with sudden facial droop.
observations: Inability to close left eye fully
Left mouth corner droop with drooling
No limb weakness, aphasia, or sensory loss
Taste reduced on anterior left tongue

title: Severe epigastric pain radiating to back
context: ED case of 49-year-old with acute abdominal pain after weekend alcohol binge.
observations: Constant epigastric pain radiating to mid-back
Serum lipase >3x upper limit of normal

title: Jaundice with cholestatic pattern
context: Hospital admission of 67-year-old with progressive painless jaundice.
observations: ALP and GGT markedly elevated relative to AST/ALT
Ultrasound: dilated intrahepatic and extrahepatic bile ducts

title: Postpartum dyspnea and orthopnea
context: Cardiology consult for 33-year-old woman 3 weeks after delivery.
history: No known prior structural heart disease

title: Acute monoarthritis of first MTP
context: Clinic visit for 57-year-old man with abrupt nighttime foot pain.
observations: Severe pain, erythema, and swelling at first metatarsophalangeal joint
Synovial fluid: needle-shaped negatively birefringent crystals
